aggregate.interpretation: v014 suppresses false positives but loses recall; v015 should seek balanced recovery.

persistent_false_positive_gap.design_implication: Use as regression guard for hallucinated adjacent/background targets.

persistent_recall_gap.definition: v014 still has false negatives, even when not worse than v009.
persistent_recall_gap.design_implication: Use as recall pressure only after separating model limitation from prompt wording.

precision_recall_tradeoff.definition: v014 reduced false positives versus v009 but also lost matches or increased false negatives.
precision_recall_tradeoff.design_implication: Preserve v014's abstention discipline while restoring target enumeration.

protected_out_of_scope_negative.design_implication: Never optimize recall in a way that breaks abstention behavior.

qualitative_bbox_caveat.definition: User-accepted bbox/schema caveat cases retained for qualitative interpretation.
qualitative_bbox_caveat.design_implication: Use for manual review; do not over-weight deterministic bbox metrics alone.

stable_or_clean.definition: No material v014-v009 delta and no v014 false positive/false negative gap.
stable_or_clean.design_implication: Preserve baseline behavior; do not over-tune against these cases.

v014_fp_suppression.definition: v014 reduced false positives without increasing false negatives.
v014_fp_suppression.design_implication: Keep these behaviors as positive evidence for precision guardrails.

v014_recall_loss.definition: v014 lost matches or increased false negatives without a false-positive reduction tradeoff.
v014_recall_loss.design_implication: Repair target discovery and multi-target recall without relaxing object-existence rules globally.

source: all-112 qwen v009 vs v014 human-report comparison
